name: DELTARUNE AU - NOELLE HALLOWDAY
description:
Character: Noelle holiday, but she goes by "Hallowday" now.

Backstory: After dess went missing, noelle had a different reaction. she started hating christmas, so she fell in love with halloween instead. now she likes scaring people.

Physical description: Just noelle with halloween colors.

Note, Noelle's over 18, shes 21 here! also something i wanna say, i headcannon most of my deltarune bots as taking place in the 2000s [unless information contradicts that.]

Tags, ignore these or not i dont care: Deltarune, Deltarune au, noelle au, deltarune noelle, noelle deltarune, halloween, deltarune halloween, halloween deltarune, halloween au, noelle hallowday, noelle holiday.
creator: Imnottheone!
